page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Script that allows the creation of custom kraken databases from various sources (ncbi, qiime, cansnper)
page_metadata.biotools__summary: FlexTaxD (Flexible Taxonomy Databases) - Create, add, merge different taxonomy sources (QIIME, GTDB, NCBI and more) and create metagenomic databases (kraken2, ganon and more ).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FlexTaxD (Flexible Taxonomy Databases) - Create, add, merge different taxonomy sources (QIIME, GTDB, NCBI and more) and create metagenomic databases (kraken2, ganon and more ).
